docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO OCT-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-30-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,599.68 FILED BY JOHNSON, MAC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ-LOPEZ, SILVIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-30-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-150) REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL - RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, MAC

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PROTEM AMANDA FISHCHER; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
